# CWE-274 — Improper Handling of Insufficient Privileges (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-274-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: continues after EPERM as if the privileged action succeeded.
func RotateAuditLog(c *gin.Context) {
	err := os.Rename("/var/log/audit/current", "/var/log/audit/prev")
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(200, gin.H{"rotated": true})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"rotated": true})
}
